negative.Cheating & Anti-Cheat: Cheaters, aimbots, wallhacks, weak anti-cheat measures
negative.Server Performance & Connectivity: Lag, high ping, stuttering, disconnects, server crashes
negative.Bugs & Technical Issues: Non-network bugs: game crashes, glitches, broken mechanics
negative.Third-Partying: A 3rd team swoops in to steal a fight or cashout — a core frustration with 3v3v3v3 format
negative.Light Class OP: Light class too strong: invisibility lasts too long, grapple/dash abuse, hard to counter
negative.Light Class Issues: Light class feels too weak, fragile, abilities underpowered or nerfed too hard
negative.Heavy Class OP: Heavy class too strong: mesh shield/dome OP, charge slam, RPG/C4 spam
negative.Heavy Class Issues: Heavy class too slow, clunky, abilities underpowered or boring
negative.Medium Class OP: Medium class too strong: healing beam too effective, defibrillator too easy
negative.Medium Class Issues: Medium class underpowered, boring to play, overshadowed by Light/Heavy
negative.Weapon Imbalance: Specific weapons OP or useless — sword broken, AKM needs nerf, sniper too strong, etc.
negative.Gadget Imbalance: Specific gadgets unfun or OP — mines everywhere, turret spam, goo grenades, RPG noob weapon
negative.Matchmaking: Unfair matchmaking, skill disparity, solo vs premade stacks, SBMM complaints, rank mismatches
negative.Spawn Points: Unfair spawn locations, spawning too far from action, spawn camping
negative.Map Design: Map layout issues, lack of map variety, bad sight lines, maps feel samey
negative.Movement & Feel: Movement nerfs compared to beta, game feels slower/clunkier, reduced mobility
negative.Audio & Sound Design: Footsteps inaudible or misleading, directional audio broken, sound balance issues
negative.Revive & Respawn Mechanics: Respawn system frustrations, revive mechanics too easy/hard, defibrillator issues
negative.Game Mode Complaints: Issues with specific modes: Power Shift boring, Terminal Attack unbalanced, Ranked broken, mode rotation
negative.Progression & Rank Resets: Rank reset frustration, XP grind, seasonal progression wipes, ranking system unfair
negative.Monetization & Battle Pass: Battle pass poor value, overpriced cosmetics, pay-to-win feel, predatory shop
negative.AI Voice Acting: Complaints about AI-generated voices replacing real voice actors, ethical concerns
negative.Player Behavior & Toxicity: AFK players, leavers, toxic chat, griefing, throwers, teamkilling
negative.Game Design Direction: Game straying from original/beta vision, catering to pros, killing casual play, devs not listening
negative.Terms of Service: Forced arbitration clause, legal concerns in updated ToS
negative.Content Drought: Lack of new maps, modes, or updates; game feels stale, not enough content
negative.Region Lock & China: Demands for region lock, Chinese cheaters/players ruining servers, VPN abuse
negative.Crossplay & Input Balance: Console vs PC unfairness, aim assist too strong/weak, forced crossplay, controller vs mouse
negative.Low Playerbase: Dead game, dying playercount, long queue times, can't find matches
negative.Linux / Steam Deck: Game doesn't work on Linux/Proton, Steam Deck incompatibility, anti-cheat blocks Linux

positive.Destructible Environments: Buildings collapse, floors break, walls blow up — unique and satisfying mechanic
positive.3v3v3v3 Format: Four-team chaos is thrilling, unpredictable, and unlike any other FPS
positive.Fun & Addictive: Core gameplay loop is enjoyable, hard to put down, great fun
positive.Movement & Combat Feel: Fluid movement, satisfying gunplay, fast-paced action, smooth controls
positive.Class System & Abilities: Three weight classes feel distinct and fun, good ability design
positive.Weapon & Gadget Variety: Good arsenal diversity, fun loadout customization, many viable builds
positive.Graphics & Visuals: Great visual quality, art style, particle effects, polish
positive.Game Modes: Cashout is fun, good mode variety, enjoyable events and LTMs
positive.Teamwork & Coordination: Playing with friends is rewarding, team synergy feels great
positive.Performance & Optimization: Game runs smoothly, good FPS, well optimized across hardware
positive.Free-to-Play Value: Fair F2P model, good value without paying, cosmetics-only monetization
positive.Sound & Music: Great audio design, satisfying sound effects, good music and atmosphere
